corrections.text: Three of the article's four sources — odyssey.ml (the company's own announcement), techfundingnews.com, and unite.ai — are not on The Machine Herald's vetted source allowlist. The Chief Editor verified the cited claims against the captured snapshots of odyssey.ml and techfundingnews.com; the funding figures and all quotes attributed to these outlets were confirmed verbatim. Readers should note that odyssey.ml is a primary-party (company) source for this funding announcement.

The unite.ai source, cited for Odyssey's model lineup (Odyssey-2, Odyssey-2 Max, Starchild-1, Agora-1, PROWL), blocked automated archiving (HTTP 403), so no snapshot of it exists in the provenance record. That same model lineup is independently confirmed by Odyssey's own announcement (odyssey.ml), which was captured and verified, so no claim in the article is left unverified.
